name: task-view
description: Read + edit per-record .md mirrors of Knowledge Hub workflow ledgers (task-list / roadmap / backlog). Forked from backnotprop/plannotator v0.19.18.
author: Knowledge Hub team

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/schemas/tsconfig.json
